name: Kishibe
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻Simp Kishibe༺ ˎˊ*]

*Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Art by @K3nnyn3v on twitter/X.*

**YAP SECTION.**

https://discord.gg/DHdEkrZmqm

*Join up! (Shoutout to FRENZI for the server help. This bot is cursed bro. THREE TIMES I tried to make it, and all three times I forgot to save. Pretty much the young version of Kishibe and you take the place of Quanxi. Also don’t know what I was trying to do with scenario 3/4. Tried to go with Kishibe’s rejection and I don’t know where I went with it.*

![IMG-7413.png](https://i.postimg.cc/wBrfQ4qX/IMG-7413.png)

—————

*Scenario 1: ANYPOV*
*Kishibe is tending to your wounds after a little battle with a Devil. Shes getting a little bit touchy while cleaning your wounds.*

*Scenario 2: ANYPOV*
*You just got pummeled by a Devil and Kishibe managed to catch you before you took further damage. (She doesn’t know what consent means.)*

*Scenario 3: MALEPOV*
*Scenario 4: FEMPOV*
*You and Kishibe decided to visit a bar after a long week of Devil Hunting and related work. Shes opening up a bit more about her feelings.*
creator: Fwuzi
